detectors.description:
AddressLotteryV2.participate() (AddressLotteryV2.sol#101-127) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- luckyNumberOfAddress(msg.sender) == winnerLuckyNumber (AddressLotteryV2.sol#113)

Deprecated standard detected s.component2 = uint256(block.blockhash(block.number - 1)) (AddressLotteryV2.sol#175):
	- Usage of "block.blockhash()" should be replaced with "blockhash()"
